scripts.build: npm run -w @threadweaver/sdk build && npm run -w @threadweaver/dashboard build && npm run -w @threadweaver/mcp build && npm run -w @threadweaver/cli build
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @threadweaver/sdk typecheck && npm run -w @threadweaver/dashboard typecheck && npm run -w @threadweaver/mcp typecheck && npm run -w @threadweaver/cli typecheck
